raw_consumer_statement:
From XXXX XXXX and utilizing my American Express Blue Cash card, on XX/XX/XXXX, I purchased XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX shirts for {$1000.00}, one in size L and one in size XL, and returned the shirt that did not fit me. XXXX XXXX then fraudulently denied my return, claiming it was dirty and damaged. I disputed this fraudulent charge with American Express. As evidence, I provided multiple high resolution color photographs showing that XXXX XXXX 's claims were completely false. The polo shirt is completely new, clean, undamaged and with all tags attached. 

However, over 2 months, American Express continued to claim that they could not ascertain the truth, even after I called them multiple times and sent multiple high resolution color photos demonstrating that the polo shirt is completely new, in perfect condition and had all the original tags. I have been a card holder since XXXX and am shocked by American Express condoning merchant fraud in the face of overwhelming evidence.
